summary: Iteration 29 — Inspection Compliance Monitor + Enhanced Dual-Panel Inspection UI. All 4 new features fully tested. Backend: 26/26 pytest pass. Frontend: All UI features verified end-to-end with Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: All new code is clean and well-structured. InspectionCompliancePage.js uses proper loading/error states. API endpoints correctly scope data by user role.
inspection_compliance.py correctly handles edge cases (threshold clamping 1-90, role-based scoping for supervisor/RO/DA/SA)
Type filter in InspectionPage.js uses hybrid click=filter/click-again=deselect pattern as required
complianceAPI in api.js correctly uses exportSigPdf with responseType='blob' for PDF download
Minor: ThresholdDialog threshold state restores correctly via useEffect on open
seed_data_creation: None created. Threshold temporarily changed to 10d then restored to 7d.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 complete. All 4 new features fully implemented and tested. Key testids: tab-inspection-monitor (Dashboard tab), inspection-compliance-page, tab-supervisors, tab-heatmap, tab-sig-history, supervisor-row-{user_id}, compliance-stat-{active|due_soon|overdue|never}, compliance-settings-btn, threshold-input, threshold-save-btn, sig-card-{id}, sig-export-pdf-{id}, type-filter-{type_id}, clear-type-filter, clear-type-filter-banner, inspection-progress, location-nav, sidebar-nav-inspection-monitor-link. Note: threshold was restored to 7d after testing.

verified_features.dashboard_3_tabs: PASS — Health Explorer, Inspection Monitor, Classic Dashboard
verified_features.missing_inspections_heatmap: PASS — 31 station rows, 9 asset type columns, heat-colored cells
verified_features.sig_history_tab: PASS — 1 SIG inspection card with PDF export button
verified_features.top_level_nav_inspection_monitor: PASS — visible in sidebar, navigates to /inspection-monitor
verified_features.compliance_threshold_settings: PASS — settings dialog opens, value updates (7→10d), button reflects new value
verified_features.sig_history_api: PASS — returns {items, total, page, page_size, total_pages}
verified_features.sig_pdf_export: PASS — returns PDF blob for existing SIG inspection
verified_features.inspection_page_type_bars: PASS — left sidebar shows 72 type filter buttons across all locations
verified_features.type_filter_click: PASS — filter banner appears, right panel shows only filtered type
verified_features.type_filter_deselect: PASS — clicking same bar again clears filter (hybrid filter behavior)
verified_features.type_filter_all_reset: PASS — 'All ↺' button in sidebar clears filter
verified_features.progress_banner: PASS — shows X/Y assets queued + defect count
verified_features.assets_grouped_by_type: PASS — sub-headers (ESCALATOR 0/1, WATERCOOLER 0/1) when no type filter active

rca_of_issues: No issues found. All 4 features implemented correctly.
